targets.sqlExpression: SELECT AVG(MemoryUsed) FROM "nat-instance" GROUP BY AutoScalingGroupName
SELECT SUM(BytesIn) FROM "nat-instance" GROUP BY AutoScalingGroupName
SELECT SUM(PacketsInCount) FROM "nat-instance" GROUP BY AutoScalingGroupName
SELECT SUM(PacketsDropInCount) FROM "nat-instance" GROUP BY AutoScalingGroupName
SELECT SUM(BytesOut) FROM "nat-instance" GROUP BY AutoScalingGroupName
SELECT SUM(PacketsOutCount) FROM "nat-instance" GROUP BY AutoScalingGroupName
SELECT SUM(PacketsDropOutCount) FROM "nat-instance" GROUP BY AutoScalingGroupName

options.content: These metrics are rates but shown as cumulative amounts.

panels.description: The number of packets queued and/or dropped because the inbound aggregate bandwidth exceeded the maximum for the instance.

targets.sqlExpression: SELECT AVG(ethtool_bw_in_allowance_exceeded) FROM "nat-instance" GROUP BY AutoScalingGroupName, interface

panels.title: Ethtool BW In Allowance Exceeded

panels.description: The number of packets queued and/or dropped because the outbound aggregate bandwidth exceeded the maximum for the instance.

targets.sqlExpression: SELECT AVG(ethtool_bw_out_allowance_exceeded) FROM "nat-instance" GROUP BY AutoScalingGroupName, interface

panels.title: Ethtool BW Out Allowance Exceeded

panels.description: The number of tracked connections that can be established by the instance before hitting the Connections Tracked allowance of that instance type.

targets.sqlExpression: SELECT AVG(ethtool_conntrack_allowance_exceeded) FROM "nat-instance" GROUP BY AutoScalingGroupName, interface

panels.title: Ethtool BW Conntrack Allowance Exceeded
